creator: tobez@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Aug 28, 2001 at 12:04:34PM -0700, mharo@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Teach portlint to recognize RUN_DEPENDS=${BUILD_DEPENDS} and the like
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->analyzed
> State-Changed-By: mharo
> State-Changed-When: Tue Aug 28 12:03:38 PDT 2001
> State-Changed-Why: 
> This has been corrected in portlint3 (development), which I expect to have
> in the ports tree shortly.

Would not it be nice to commit some kind of a fix before portlint3 hits
the tree?  It's been a while since this PR was submitted, and the number
of such ports is growing...

=Anton.
